expectations.text: The skill was invoked (wheel-detector skill was used)
expectations.evidence: Baseline run — no skill was provided. This is expected for the baseline comparison.

expectations.text: A structured report was generated with findings
expectations.evidence: Report has 11 findings with structure: severity levels, locations, descriptions, recommendations, summary table

expectations.text: Findings are grouped by confidence level
expectations.evidence: Findings grouped by severity: HIGH (3), MEDIUM (3), LOW (5). Different terminology but same concept.

expectations.text: The report includes a summary section
expectations.evidence: Summary table at the bottom with all 11 findings, severity, locations, and actions. Also has estimated cleanup effort.
